privileged_info_summary: The task requires registering a new Jenkins agent node named 'frontend-builder-01' with 4 executors, remote root directory '/opt/jenkins-agent', labels 'frontend linux high-mem', EXCLUSIVE usage mode (only for jobs with matching label expressions), and JNLP launcher (agent-initiated inbound connection). All metadata values are correctly derived from the task description and correspond to valid Jenkins configuration parameters.
